category_name: Management Reporting, CFO Support and Industry-Specific Accounting
service_group: Management Reporting, CFO Support and Specialized SME Accounting

services.name: Management Reporting
services.description: Monthly management reporting that turns accounting data into business indicators, margins, cash-flow and financial insights.

services.name: Fractional CFO
services.description: Part-time external CFO support for budgeting, cash-flow planning, bank discussions and financial decision support.

services.name: Financial Projections
services.description: Financial projections for bank loans, EU funding applications, budgets and financing discussions.

services.name: Financial Statement Explanation
services.description: Business-oriented explanation of balance sheet, profit and loss account and financial indicators.

services.name: Financial Due Diligence
services.description: Financial due diligence and small business evaluation support for buying or selling a company.

services.name: IT and Software Company Accounting
services.description: Accounting for Romanian IT SRLs, software freelancers and micro-agencies with international contracts and recurring revenue.

services.name: E-commerce and Marketplace Accounting
services.description: Accounting support for e-commerce stores and marketplaces selling in Romania and the EU.

services.name: HoReCa Accounting
services.description: Accounting for restaurants, cafes and HoReCa businesses, including inventory, fiscal receipts, margins and VAT specifics.

services.name: Construction Project Accounting
services.description: Accounting setup for construction companies and contractors to track costs, revenues and margins by project or site.

services.name: Medical and Dental Practice Accounting
services.description: Accounting for medical and dental practices, covering income, expenses, medical equipment and fiscal treatment.
